title: ModeFamilyRecord
description: A mode family: a set of modes across different contexts identified as the same physical mode by the matching engine.

memberModeIds.description: Mode IDs that belong to this family, across all contexts

contextIds.description: Context IDs (background IDs, branch IDs, etc.) in which this family has members

isStable.description: Whether the family is stable (all members matched with high confidence)

ambiguityCount.description: Number of ambiguous matches in this family's history

alignments.description: Alignment records tracing how modes were matched across contexts

alignmentType.description: Alignment type: matched, birth, death, split, merge, avoided-crossing

confidence.description: Confidence level [0, 1]. Low confidence indicates ambiguity.

nativeOverlap.description: O1: Native inner product overlap |v1^T M_state v2|

observedSignatureOverlap.description: O2: Observed signature overlap similarity(Obs(v1), Obs(v2))

featureDistance.description: O3: Invariant feature distance. Lower = more similar.

aggregateScore.description: Weighted aggregate score. Higher = better match. Range [0, 1].

isMatch.description: Whether the aggregate score exceeds the matching threshold
